scene_1.visual_plan: Start with a medium shot of the model looking directly at the camera in a softly lit bathroom setting with natural light. The camera is steady on a tripod with a gentle dolly-in as the model begins speaking to foster an intimate connection. Immediately after the first line, cut to a close-up of the KYOGOKU Color Shampoo bottle held naturally in the model’s right hand, showing the label clearly. Then cut back to the medium shot with the model now holding the product near her face, maintaining eye contact with the camera. Depth of field is shallow throughout to keep the focus on the model and product while softly blurring the background.
scene_1.dialogue: 使い始める前に知っておきたかったことなんですけど、ずっと白髪隠しで失敗してばかりで困っていました。

scene_2.visual_plan: Begin the scene again with a medium shot of the model looking directly into the camera, seated in the same bright bathroom space. The camera remains on a tripod with a subtle zoom-in as she continues to speak. After the first sentence, cut to a POV shot of the shampoo being squeezed onto the hand, demonstrating texture and application. Then cut back to the medium shot where the model holds the product in her right hand near the face, smiling softly. The shallow depth of field keeps focus on her expression and the bottle, emphasizing the natural ingredients and luxurious feel.
scene_2.dialogue: KYOGOKUのカラーシャンプーに出会って、これは白髪も自然にカバーしながらリンゴ幹細胞やヒアルロン酸で髪と頭皮をしっかり養ってくれるんです。

scene_3.visual_plan: Open with a medium shot of the model looking directly at the camera, still in the same bathroom setting. The camera on a tripod softly zooms in as she delivers the final lines to maintain viewer engagement. After her first line, cut to a secondary cinematic angle from the side showing the model relaxed and gently running fingers through shiny hair with the shampoo bottle resting visibly on the counter next to her. Cut back to the medium shot as she finishes, holding the bottle one last time in her right hand near her chin to highlight it before gently placing it down.
scene_3.dialogue: 今では髪が健康的でツヤツヤになって、洗うたびに花園のような香りに包まれて癒されています。
